title: Snowfall's Mace Pack
description: Mace pack made by snowfall. Everything is textured around my profile picture of a cloud with snow falling.
body:
Mace pack based on my profile picture!
---------------------------------
FEATURES:
Low fire
Low shield
Retextured mace related items (such as the mace, elytra, wind charge and more!)
New cool dark gui, including the hotbar and inventory
Small utilities (like food and totems)
AND MUCH MORE!
